data: {"generalSituation":"An easterly airstream will bring a few showers to the coast of Guangdong tomorrow. An area of low pressure will bring unsettled weather to the vicinity of Taiwan. Besides, a trough of low pressure will edge closer to the coast of southern China gradually over the weekend. There will be more showers over the region. In addition, under the influence of an active southwest monsoon and upper-air disturbances, there will be occasional heavy showers and squally thunderstorms over southern China and the northern part of the South China Sea early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260612","week":"Friday","forecastWind":"East to southeast force 3 to 4.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers.","forecastMaxtemp":{"value":29,"unit":"C"},"forecastMintemp":{"value":26,"unit":"C"},"forecastMaxrh":{"value":95,"unit":"percent"},"forecastMinrh":{"value":70,"unit":"percent"},"ForecastIcon":62,"PSR":"Medium Low"},{"forecastDate":"20260613","week":"Saturday","forecastWind":"South to southwest force 4, force 5 later, occasionally force 6 on high ground.","forecastWeather":"Mainly cloudy with a few showers and thunderstorms.
